info.title: AWeber API
info.description: AWeber is an email marketing platform. The AWeber API provides RESTful access to manage subscriber lists, send broadcasts, manage campaigns, custom fields, webforms, segments, and integrations. Uses OAuth 2.0 authentication.

tags.name: Broadcasts
tags.description: Create, schedule, and manage email broadcasts

get.description: Get a paginated collection of accounts authorized by the user.
Get a single account by ID.
Get a paginated collection of lists for an account.
Get a single list by ID.
Get all tags associated with a list.
Get a paginated collection of subscribers for a list.

post.description: Add a new subscriber to a list.

get.description: Get a single subscriber by ID.

delete.description: Delete a subscriber from a list.

post.description: Move a subscriber to another list.

Location.description: URL of the subscriber on the new list

get.description: Get a paginated collection of broadcasts for a list.

post.description: Create a new broadcast (draft) for a list.

get.description: Get a single broadcast by ID.

post.description: Schedule a draft broadcast for delivery.

scheduled_for.description: Date and time to send the broadcast

get.description: Get total count of broadcasts for a list.
Get a paginated collection of campaigns (broadcasts and follow-ups) for a list.
Get custom fields for a list.

post.description: Add a new custom field to a list.

get.description: Get a collection of segments for a list.
Get integrations associated with an account.
Get landing pages for an account.
Get webforms for a specific list.

scopes.list.read: Retrieve lists, custom fields, tags, and sign up forms
scopes.list.write: Create, edit, and delete custom fields
scopes.subscriber.write: Create, edit, delete, and move subscribers
scopes.email.read: Retrieve broadcast and follow-up email activity

wsStart.name: ws.start
wsStart.description: Zero-based index to start the page at

wsSize.name: ws.size
wsSize.description: Maximum number of entries to return per page

strict_custom_fields.description: If true, reject unknown custom fields
